Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SExpr.Type

  • Packages that use SExpr.Type 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2  

    • Uses of SExpr.Type in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2

      Fields in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2 declared as SExpr.Type 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static SExpr.Type SExpr.Type.BOOL
      to indicate that an expression holds a value of type Bool
      static SExpr.Type IntegerOpHandler.INT
      to indicate that an expression holds a value of type Int.
      static SExpr.Type SExpr.Type.NONE
      to indicate that this expression has other or unknown type
      static SExpr.Type SExpr.Type.UNIVERSE
      to indicate that this expression holds a value of type U
      static SExpr.Type SExpr.Type.VERBATIM
      to indicate that this element needs no escaping despite its name
      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2 that return SExpr.Type 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      SExpr.Type SExpr.getType() 
      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2 with parameters of type SExpr.Type 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static java.util.List<SExpr> SExprs.coerce(java.util.List<SExpr> exprs, SExpr.Type type)
      Takes a list of SExprs and converts it to a list of the given type, if possible.
      static SExpr SExprs.coerce(SExpr exp, SExpr.Type type)
      Takes an SExpression and converts it to the given type, if possible.
      java.util.List<SExpr> MasterHandler.translate(java.lang.Iterable<Term> terms, SExpr.Type type)
      Translate a list of terms into a list of SExprs.
      SExpr MasterHandler.translate(Term problem, SExpr.Type type)
      Translate a single term to an SMTLib S-Expression.
      Constructors in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2 with parameters of type SExpr.Type 
      Constructor and Description
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type)
      Create a new s-expr without children, but with a given type.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type, java.util.List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type, SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type, java.lang.String... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
